description: Complete StayBooking platform covering all four core modules: Authentication (JWT, GUEST/HOST roles), Listing Management (GCS photo upload, geocoding), Listing Search (PostGIS geo-distance), and Booking (conflict detection, CONFIRMED/CANCELLED states). Generate the full backend and frontend in a single pass.
functional_requirements: Users can register with a username, password, and role (GUEST or HOST)
Registered users can login with username and password to receive a JWT token
JWT-protected endpoints reject unauthenticated requests with 401
As a host, I can create a new property listing with title, description, address, price, and availability dates; the address is geocoded to latitude and longitude using Google Maps Geocoding API
As a host, I can upload up to 6 photos for my listing; photos are stored in Google Cloud Storage and the listing stores the resulting public URLs
As a host, I can edit or delete my own listings; other users receive a 403 if they attempt to modify my listing
As a guest, I can search listings by location (geocoded address), date range, and optional price range; listings with conflicting bookings are excluded
Location search finds listings within a configurable radius (default 50 km) using PostGIS spatial distance
Search results are paginated with a default page size of 20
As a guest, I can book a listing for a specific date range; conflicting dates return 409
As a guest, I can view all my bookings
As a guest, I can cancel a booking I made; another user attempting to cancel my booking receives 403
non_functional_requirements: Create, update, and delete listing endpoints require JWT authentication
Only the host who created a listing can modify or delete it
Listing coordinates stored as PostGIS Point geometry using Hibernate Spatial
Photo upload accepts multipart/form-data; each image stored as a separate GCS object
Search endpoint is public (no authentication required)
Geographic distance computed using PostGIS ST_Distance or Hibernate Spatial
All booking endpoints require JWT authentication
Booking creation must prevent double-booking via atomic check-and-insert
